audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition with Daniel beast imagery and imperial cult symbolism; draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for sea beast, land beast, image, mark, number 666. Anti-paranoia and anti-targeting safeguards required.

verses.restored: And I saw a beast rising from sea, having ten horns and seven heads, with ten crowns on horns and blasphemous names on heads.
The beast was like leopard, feet like bear, mouth like lion; dragon gave it power, throne, and great authority.
One of its heads seemed slain into death, and its wound was healed; whole earth marveled after beast.
They worshiped dragon because he gave authority to beast, and worshiped beast, saying: Who is like the beast, and who can war with it?
A mouth was given speaking great things and blasphemies, and authority to act forty-two months.
It opened its mouth in blasphemy toward the Divine, to blaspheme his name, dwelling, and those dwelling in heaven.
It was given to make war with holy ones and conquer them, and authority was given over every tribe, people, tongue, and nation.
All dwelling on earth will worship it, everyone whose name has not been written from foundation of world in scroll of life of the Lamb slain.
If anyone is for captivity, into captivity one goes; if anyone kills by sword, by sword one must be killed. Here is endurance and trust of holy ones.
And I saw another beast rising from earth; it had two horns like lamb and spoke like dragon.
It exercises all authority of first beast before it, and makes earth and those dwelling in it worship first beast whose death-wound was healed.
It does great signs, even making fire descend from heaven to earth before humans.
It misleads earth-dwellers by signs given it to do before beast, telling them to make image to beast that had sword-wound and lived.
It was given to give breath to image of beast, so image might speak and cause those not worshiping image to be killed.
It makes all, small and great, rich and poor, free and enslaved, receive a mark on right hand or forehead,
so no one may buy or sell unless having the mark, the name of beast or number of its name.
Here is wisdom: the one having mind calculate number of beast, for it is number of human; its number is six hundred sixty-six.

translation_notes: Beasts combine Daniel imagery and imperial power/cult symbolism; avoid mapping them onto modern persons or groups.
Mark of beast is allegiance/economic participation imagery, not random technology panic.
666 is apocalyptic gematria/empire-number needing second-pass audit.
safety_note: Revelation 13 must not fuel conspiracy targeting, antisemitism, anti-vaccine/technology panic, or violence. It critiques coercive empire, propaganda, worship, and economic allegiance.
